candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the explicit total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets; not ACT.
Explicit cash and cash equivalents balance-sheet line; directly matches CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: CF ending cash agrees numerically, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning-period cash, not the period-end balance-sheet amount.

candidates.row_label: Foreign exchange difference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX movement line, not the cash balance.
Not a cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Adjustment for non-cash items - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet cash line rather than the cash-flow ending cash duplicate.

candidates.why: Explicit reported total current liabilities; directly matches LCT.
Appears as an ambiguous/non-total line and duplicated label; inferior to the explicit total.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities; not LCT.

Given the capital structure shown, this appears to be the likely current portion of borrowings/debt, especially since non-current 'Borrowings' and separate 'Current lease liabilities' are reported. However, the label is generic and duplicated, so identification is somewhat ambiguous.
Cash-flow movement, not a balance-sheet stock of short-term debt; not preferred for STD.

variables.notes: Chosen as the most plausible non-lease short-term debt line because it sits with financing liabilities, has modest values separate from trade payables/taxes, and current lease liabilities are disclosed separately. However, the generic duplicated label 'Current liabilities' makes this less certain than usual.

candidates.why: Explicit current tax liabilities line; directly matches taxes payable/current tax payable.

variables.notes: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best explicit total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferable to narrower component lines.
PPE component only, likely excluding leasehold improvements and/or right-of-use assets; inferior to the broader total PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Lease-related tangible asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross lease-related component, not net total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Investments in Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation - Property, Plant & Equipment - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Depreciation expense/reconciliation item, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Priority given to the broader total PPE label. Included 'Plant and equipment' as lower-priority fallback because labels may vary across years.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line; directly matches AT.
Explicit net cash flow from operating activities; directly matches OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final operating cash flow line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
